rule_description: same JUG component conservatively groups samples together; future graph hash should strengthen evidence
same CYS SG--ligand CAG event supports grouping; event identity alone is not general similarity
PDB numeric similarity must not be used as biological evidence
no sequence identity claim; future protein accession/sequence cluster required
no graph fingerprint claim; future canonical graph hash/scaffold clustering required
members of one leakage group cannot cross data splits
random row split is forbidden for leakage-related samples
current one-group pilot cannot support three-way split
more independent groups required before split materialization
